name: Chocolate Covered Peanut Butter Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Laura Scudder's All Natural-Smooth Peanut Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwave-safe bowl, microwave margarine and brown sugar on high power for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds until the brown sugar is melted.
2. Stir in powdered sugar, peanut butter, and vanilla.
3. Shape by teaspoonfuls into egg shapes and chill.
4. In a double boiler or heavy saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate chips and shortening.
5. Dip each egg into the chocolate mixture, coating completely.
6. Place on wax paper-lined baking sheets.
7. Chill.
8. Store in refrigerator.
